rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Network Connections (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Network Connections (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: f3b0b17c-0e4b-45e5-b88e-521d2c3f6ae1
status: experimental
description: Detects notepad making network connections, a potential process injection
  signal. Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/process-injection/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.privilege_escalation
- attack.t1055
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \notepad.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
